questions.question: Which restaurants in Boston Ma are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Boston Ma with weekend hours include: Dunkin' (Sat: 04:00-19:00), Starbucks (Sat: 06:00-21:00), Subway (Sat: 08:00-22:00), Hungry Coyote (Sat: 10:00-24:00), Qdoba (Sat: 10:30-23:00), Five Guys (Sat: 11:00-22:00), Chipotle (Sat: 10:45-22:00), Subway (Sat: 08:00-20:30) and 1657 more. 1665 total with weekend availability.
